description: Planner cartridge - demonstrates the looplet alternative to a built-in 'plan mode'. Instead of hard-coding a plan/execute split into the loop, the parent delegates planning to a child cartridge via the `subagent` builtin tool, then executes the returned plan itself. This composes cleanly out of looplet primitives (subagent, done) - no special phase, no monolith.
name: planner
